---
title: "Customer Rate Limit Report"
subtitle: "Analysis of customer rate limiting patterns and trends"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      body-width: 1800px
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@media (min-width: 1200px) {
  #quarto-content.page-columns {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 250px 1fr !important;
    gap: 2em !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar {
    grid-column: 1 !important;
    position: sticky !important;
    top: 1rem !important;
    height: fit-content !important;
  }
  #quarto-document-content {
    grid-column: 2 !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1199px) {
  #quarto-content.page-columns { display: block !important; }
  #quarto-sidebar {
    position: relative !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-bottom: 2rem !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    padding-bottom: 1rem !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar nav {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.5rem 1.5rem !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar nav ul {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.25rem 1.5rem !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    list-style: none !important;
  }
  #quarto-document-content { max-width: 100% !important; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  #quarto-sidebar { display: none !important; }
  #quarto-document-content { max-width: 100% !important; }
}
.column-body { max-width: 100% !important; }
div.cell-output-display { width: 100% !important; }

.filter-row {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  gap: 1rem !important;
  align-items: flex-end !important;
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
}
.filter-row > div {
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
  min-width: 100px !important;
}
.filter-row form { margin: 0 !important; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Load data from SQL pipeline outputs
summary = FileAttachment("data/agg_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
detailRaw = FileAttachment("data/agg_detail.csv").csv()
detail = detailRaw.map(d => ({
  ...d,
  tickets_update_limit: +d.tickets_update_limit,
  tickets_update_used: +d.tickets_update_used,
  errors_429_count: +d.errors_429_count
}))
```

## Executive Summary

Customers with ticket update limits below 5,000 who are actively hitting rate limits (HTTP 429 errors). Filtered to accounts created before July 2019 with more than 300 ticket updates used.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

totalAccounts = detail.length
total429Errors = d3.sum(detail, d => d.errors_429_count)
avgTicketsUsed = Math.round(d3.mean(detail, d => d.tickets_update_used))

md`
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Accounts affected** | ${totalAccounts.toLocaleString()} |
| **Total 429 errors** | ${total429Errors.toLocaleString()} |
| **Avg tickets used** | ${avgTicketsUsed.toLocaleString()} |`
```

**Download data:** [Summary (CSV)](data/agg_summary.csv) | [Detail (CSV)](data/agg_detail.csv)


## Accounts by Rate Limit Tier

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  height: 350,
  marginLeft: 200,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Number of Accounts"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(summary, {
      y: "category",
      x: "count",
      fill: "category",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(summary, {
      y: "category",
      x: "count",
      text: d => d.count.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```

## 429 Errors by Limit Tier

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  height: 350,
  marginLeft: 200,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Total 429 Errors"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(summary, {
      y: "category",
      x: "total_429_errors",
      fill: "category",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(summary, {
      y: "category",
      x: "total_429_errors",
      text: d => d.total_429_errors.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```


## Account Details

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(detail, {
  format: {
    instance_account_id: x => x
  },
  columns: [
    "instance_account_id",
    "instance_account_name",
    "tickets_update_limit",
    "tickets_update_used",
    "errors_429_count"
  ],
  header: {
    instance_account_id: "Account ID",
    instance_account_name: "Account Name",
    tickets_update_limit: "Update Limit",
    tickets_update_used: "Updates Used",
    errors_429_count: "429 Errors"
  },
  format: {
    instance_account_id: x => x
  },
  sort: "errors_429_count",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 25
})
```


## Methodology

### Data Sources

| Source | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `FACT_CAPACITY_AGGREGATED_API_USAGE_DATA_DAILY_SNAPSHOT` | Daily API usage with rate limit and 429 error counts |
| `BASE_INSTANCE_ACCOUNTS` | Account metadata (name, creation date) |

### Filters

- Accounts created before **2019-07-01**
- Ticket update limit **< 5,000**
- Ticket updates used **> 300**
- At least **1** HTTP 429 error
- One row per account (highest 429 error count)
